introSection: Mini Mouse Cartoon is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Parc Saint Paul in Saint-Paul, Hauts-de-France, France. Built by Zamperla, it opened on 10 April 2004 and follows a wild mouse layout.
fullText: Mini Mouse Cartoon is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Parc Saint Paul in Saint-Paul, Hauts-de-France, France. Built by Zamperla, it opened on 10 April 2004 and follows a wild mouse layout.
